If there is no `rootNode`, the user is told to add content; no request is sent.\n-  3. `rootNode` is converted to REXA with **`builderRootToRexaJson`** (`lib/builderToRexa.ts`).\n-  4. **`validateRexaJson`** (`lib/rexa/validation.ts`) runs on that REXA payload (max depth 20, max nodes 500, required `type` field, known widget types).\n+  3. `rootNode` is converted to SDUI with **`builderRootToSduiJson`** (`lib/builderToSdui.ts`).\n+  4. **`validateSduiJson`** (`lib/sdui/validation.ts`) runs on that SDUI payload (max depth 20, max nodes 500, required `type` field, known widget types).\n   5. If validation fails, an alert shows the error and Publish is aborted.\n   6. If there are only warnings, a confirm dialog asks whether to continue; then the request is sent with `rootNode`.\n - **Server (publish route):**\n-  1. If **`rootNode`** is sent: converts to REXA with **`builderRootToRexaJson`**, then validates with **`validateRexaJson`**.\n-  3. If **`rexaJson`** is sent: validates as-is.\n-  4. If validation fails → 422 with message; otherwise the REXA JSON is stored in `LayoutVersion` and served to the Flutter SDK.\n+  1. Accepts either **`sduiJson`** (SDUI format) or **`rootNode`** (builder format).\n+  2. If **`rootNode`** is sent: converts to SDUI with **`builderRootToSduiJson`**, then validates with **`validateSduiJson`**.\n+  3. If **`sduiJson`** is sent: validates as-is.\n+  4. If validation fails → 422 with message; otherwise the SDUI JSON is stored in `LayoutVersion` and served to the Flutter SDK.\n \n So: **proper validation before publishing** is done both in the UI (so the user sees errors immediately) and on the server (so invalid payloads are never stored).\n \n-**Relevant files:** `lib/builderToRexa.ts`, `lib/rexa/validation.ts`, `components/builder/Toolbar.tsx` (handlePublish), `app/api/layouts/[id]/publish/route.ts`.\n+**Relevant files:** `lib/builderToSdui.ts`, `lib/sdui/validation.ts`, `components/builder/Toolbar.tsx` (handlePublish), `app/api/layouts/[id]/publish/route.ts`.\n \n ---\n \n@@ -42,9 +42,9 @@ So: **proper validation before publishing** is done both in the UI (so the user\n - **Portal** = this Next.js app (dashboard, editor, APIs). **baseUrl** = portal origin, e.g. `https://your-rexa-portal.com`.\n+1. **SduiLayoutFetcher** (in `lib/src/fetcher/layout_fetcher.dart`):\n+   - **baseUrl** = portal origin, e.g. `https://your-sdui-portal.com`.\n    - **apiKey** = project API key from the portal (Project Settings).\n    - Fetches: **GET `{baseUrl}/api/v1/screens/{screenName}?apiKey={apiKey}`**.\n \n-2. **RexaScreen** widget:\n+2. **SduiScreen** widget:\n    - Validates `apiKey` → project, checks project status.\n    - Loads the latest active **LayoutVersion** for that project and `screenName`.\n-   - Returns JSON: `{ success: true, screen, version, publishedAt, layout }` where **layout** is the **REXA JSON** (same format the builder publishes after conversion).\n+   - diff --git a/app/sitemap.ts b/app/sitemap.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..af6c512
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/sitemap.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+import { MetadataRoute } from 'next'
+
+export default function sitemap(): MetadataRoute.Sitemap {
+  const baseUrl = 'https://sdui.in'
+  
+  return [
+    {
+      url: baseUrl,
+      lastModified: new Date(),
+      changeFrequency: 'daily',
+      priority: 1,
+    },
+    {
+      url: `${baseUrl}/features`,
+      lastModified: new Date(),
+      changeFrequency: 'weekly',
+      priority: 0.8,
+    },
+    {
+      url: `${baseUrl}/pricing`,
+      lastModified: new Date(),
+      changeFrequency: 'monthly',
+      priority: 0.5,
+    },
+    {
+      url: `${baseUrl}/docs`,
+      lastModified: new Date(),
+      changeFrequency: 'weekly',
+      priority: 0.9,
+    },
+  ]
+}

diff --git a/app/sitemap.ts b/app/sitemap.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..af6c512
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/sitemap.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+import { MetadataRoute } from 'next'
+
+export default function sitemap(): MetadataRoute.Sitemap {
+  const baseUrl = 'https://sdui.in'
+  
+  return [
+    {
+      url: baseUrl,
+      lastModified: new Date(),
+      changeFrequency: 'daily',
+      priority: 1,
+    },
+    {
+      url: `${baseUrl}/features`,
+      lastModified: new Date(),
+      changeFrequency: 'weekly',
+      priority: 0.8,
+    },
+    {
+      url: `${baseUrl}/pricing`,
+      lastModified: new Date(),
+      changeFrequency: 'monthly',
+      priority: 0.5,
+    },
+    {
+      url: `${baseUrl}/docs`,
+      lastModified: new Date(),
+      changeFrequency: 'weekly',
+      priority: 0.9,
+    },
+  ]
+}
